column1: Grade Sheet Creation and Point Files
Permit requirements startup (Gas line crossings, rail crossings, SaskPower, Sasktel ect)
Set up work order for Project and Admin
Submition Evaluations Review contractor qualifications and references
Email Canada Post (Rocco) with any box that needs relocation (dedicated PM)
Setup meeting with school board to present projects (dedicated PM)
Update C3DR based on contractor Schedule
Go to site to check if any trees need pruning / removal
set up onsite meetings with internal crews such as foresty and SDO for domestic for tree conflicts
Send Initial Communication Letter (send to citymanager email with Councilor Name, cc Manager, Director and Construction Coordination email)
Request for basement inspection for complex projects (Send to Risk Management with all required documentations)
Set up submital folder, send to contractor, and review contractor submittals
Set up payment progress sheet and Payment Certificate
Check all the submittals to provide notice to proceed
Finilize grade sheets and point files for each location
Setup weekly site safety inspection on calendar
Send 2 week Construction letters (send to citymanager email with Councilor Name, cc Manager, Director and Construction Coordination email)
Set up in-person meeting with affected businesses
Prepare emergency response plan for all rebuild projects and send to Fire Marshall
Send TAR Request for projects (CPI) include emergency response plan
Set up Project File for Schedule Tracking
Walkthrough with Contractor of the site locations
Maintain daily logs (OneNote) and progress reports
Track progress against schedule and milestones (Microsoft Project)
Quality assurance inspections (materials, workmanship) RCO and IDS Inspector
Document change orders and approvals (if more than $10,000 check with Manager)
After phase is comeplete, provide deficiency list to contractor
Phase change letter to resident and businesses
Environmental compliance (erosion, runoff, silt fencing etc.)
Review deficiency list, provide response to contractor
Validate contractor invoices against work completed (Progress Payments)
Track contingency and change order costs
Ensure timely payments per contract terms (Send to Senior Engineer to Reciept)
Issue regular progress updates to stakeholders
Ensure OneNote is being updated everyday
Maintain updated project files (drawings, permits, approvals)
File All pre-construction, construction and deficeincy photos
Final inspection and punch(??) list completion
Receive and sign substantial completion form (C.1) and return to contractor for 40 days
Performance Holdback Release depending on performance and quality
Perform Warranty Inspection on spring of Year I and complete documentation Year I
Send Deficiency List to the contractor (Year I)
Perfom Warranty Inspection of Spring of Year II
Send Deficiency List to the contractor (Year II)
Check Deficiency document for further action items
